stem: A scatterplot shows points (x, y) where x ranges from 0 to 20 and y ranges from 0 to 50. The data shows a moderate positive trend, with a y-intercept near 38 and y-values rising approximately to 44 at x = 20. Which of the following could be an equation of the line of best fit?
rationale: The y-intercept is approximately 38 (eliminating c and d), and the slope is approximately (44 − 38)/20 = 0.3 (eliminating a). So y = 38 + 0.3x is correct. Choice (b) is correct.
